rankingCriteria.seoOpportunity: Search demand and ranking upside for exam-specific commercial/informational keywords.
rankingCriteria.conversionValue: Likelihood the page can move a visitor toward questions, CAT, flashcards, lessons, checkout, or email capture.
rankingCriteria.existingContentAvailability: How much substantive product, lesson, question, or cluster content already exists.
rankingCriteria.internalLinkPotential: How naturally the page can receive and send pathway-aware internal links.
rankingCriteria.implementationEffort: 1 is easiest, 10 is hardest; total score rewards lower effort.
